_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: GitHub Actions Runner
author: avalongamecs@gmail.com
description: GitHub Actions runner (non-root runtime, auto-register, auto-start).
startup: getent passwd container >/dev/null 2>&1 || useradd -M -s /bin/bash container; su -s /bin/bash container -c 'cd /home/container/actions-runner && [ ! -f .runner ] && ./config.sh --unattended --url \"$REPO_URL\" --token \"$REG_TOKEN\" --work _work --replace || true && exec bash run.sh'

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash

set -euo pipefail

echo "[install] start"

[ -z "${REPO_URL:-}" ] && echo "REPO_URL required" && exit 1
[ -z "${REG_TOKEN:-}" ] && echo "REG_TOKEN required" && exit 1

RV="2.329.0"
SH="194f1e1e4bd02f80b7e9633fc546084d8d4e19f3928a324d512ea53430102e1d"

# Create the container user if it does not exist
if ! getent passwd container > /dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "[install] creating container user"
    useradd -M -s /bin/bash container
fi

# Skip re-download/extract if the runner is already installed
if [ -f /mnt/server/actions-runner/run.sh ]; then
    echo "[install] runner already installed, skipping download"
    chown -R container:container /mnt/server/actions-runner
    echo "[install] done"
    exit 0
fi

mkdir -p /mnt/server/actions-runner
cd /mnt/server/actions-runner

echo "[install] downloading"
curl -fsSL -o runner.tar.gz https://github.com/actions/runner/releases/download/v${RV}/actions-runner-linux-x64-${RV}.tar.gz

echo "[install] verifying"
echo "${SH}  runner.tar.gz" | sha256sum -c -

echo "[install] extracting"
tar xzf runner.tar.gz
rm -f runner.tar.gz

echo "[install] chown"
chown -R container:container /mnt/server/actions-runner

echo "[install] done"

variables.name: Registration Token
variables.description: GitHub runner registration token (from repo/org settings).
